description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a mustard yellow leather upper and a white rubber sole. The shoe features white laces threaded through metal eyelets and a slightly padded collar for comfort. The leather surface appears textured and somewhat glossy, with visible creases and signs of wear, especially around the toe box and heel. The outsole is thick and extends slightly upward at the toe and heel, providing extra durability. The interior lining is brown, and there is a hint of blue visible on the tongue, possibly from a label or branding. The overall silhouette is classic and casual, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A mustard yellow leather sneaker with white laces and a thick white rubber sole, showing visible creases and signs of wear. The shoe has a classic low-top design with a slightly glossy, textured finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the mustard yellow leather upper, white laces, and thick white rubber sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel, brown interior lining, and the upward curve of the white sole at the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with visible creasing and the blue detail on the tongue.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the white laces, rounded toe, and the textured, slightly worn appearance of the upper.
